Notes: Delete the zone apex by name and then query apex SOA/NS to see whether the server refused the update, partially preserved mandatory apex data, or applied deletion semantics inconsistently.

Steps.Description: Issue delete_name for the zone apex campus.edu. with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex SOA survives after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex NS survives after the UPDATE.
